Modified: branches/2014Q1/net/jags/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- branches/2014Q1/net/jags/Makefile	Wed Jan  8 11:57:47 2014	(r339108)
+++ branches/2014Q1/net/jags/Makefile	Wed Jan  8 11:58:14 2014	(r339109)
@@ -16,16 +16,10 @@ SAMBA_PORT?=	net/samba36
 
 CONFLICTS=	jags-1.*
 
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
+USES=		gmake
 USE_XORG=	xi xext x11
 USE_GNOME=	gtk12
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
-.if ${OSVERSION} >= 700042
 CFLAGS+=	-ffriend-injection
-.endif
 
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>
